Package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.cosmetics

Enum SoundCompletion

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SoundCompletion>
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.cosmetics.SoundCompletion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SoundCompletion>, java.lang.constant.Constable, Completion
public enum SoundCompletion extends Enum<SoundCompletion> implements Completion
Represents a custom completion a player has to achieve to unlock Sound Event Cosmetics.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ADVANCEMENT_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when completing a 1.12+ advancement.
    BED_ENTER_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when entering a bed.
    BLOCK_BREAK_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when breaking a block.
    BLOCK_PLACE_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when placing a block.
    CHANGE_WORLD_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when going to another world (e.g.
    DEATH_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when dying.
    DYE_SHEEP_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when shearing a sheep.
    EDIT_BOOK_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when editing a book.
    EGG_THROW_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when throwing an egg.
    EXPERIENCE_CHANGE_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when your experience changes.
    FISH_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when fishing.
    FURNACE_EXTRACT_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when extracting an item from a furnace.
    INVENTORY_OPEN_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when opening an inventory.
    JOIN_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when joining the server.
    RESPAWN_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when respawning.
    RIPTIDE_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when using a riptiding trident.
    SIGN_CHANGE_COMPLETION
    Completion used for sounds when changing a sign.

    Fetches the event that this SoundCompletion is hooked to in SoundEventSelection.AVAILABLE_EVENTS.

    Fetches the key used in the config to fetch whether this Completion is done.

      Completion used for sounds when entering a bed.

    • CHANGE_WORLD_COMPLETION

      public static final SoundCompletion CHANGE_WORLD_COMPLETION
      Completion used for sounds when going to another world (e.g. going through a nether portal)

      public static SoundCompletion valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:

      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
